about_quotes.speaker: Anat Cohen
about_quotes.evidence: Oded is my high school friend and he is the musical director of the tentet, the project that we have together, and he’s also the person that really runs Anzic Records because all the albums that I recorded came out on our own label, a label we established together in 2007
about_quotes.doc_title: Anat Cohen interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 9, 2021
